name: relayfile
description: relayfile — real-time filesystem for humans and agents

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk/typescript && npm run build --workspace=packages/local-mount
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/core && npm run test --workspace=packages/sdk/typescript && npm run test --workspace=packages/local-mount && npm --prefix packages/file-observer test
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/sdk/typescript && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/local-mount
scripts.evals:offline: npm run evals:compile && node scripts/evals/run-relayfile-evals.mjs --mode offline
